description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a light-colored brick exterior. The structure features large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is centrally located, accessible by a small set of steps, and is flanked by wide windows. There is an attached driveway and garage area extending from one side of the house, with paved walkways surrounding the building. The upper floor includes a balcony or terrace area, visible from multiple angles, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms. The house appears spacious, with multiple rooms and open areas both inside and outside.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a light brick exterior, featuring a central entryway and attached driveway. The design is geometric and open, with a visible upper terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and attached driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, upper terrace, and the side wall with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, the flat roof, and the extension of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, paved driveway, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, small steps, and wide flanking windows; no porch or columns.
